content: The top running speed of a cheetah is approximately 120 km/h (75 mph). Some cheetahs have been recorded to reach speeds of up to 128 km/h (80 mph) over short distances.
raw_content: The top running speed of a cheetah is approximately 120 km/h (75 mph). Some cheetahs have been recorded to reach speeds of up to 128 km/h (80 mph) over short distances.
